# Nickel Browser Pull Request Template

## Summary
Briefly describe the changes introduced by this pull request.

## Related Issues
Link to any related issues (e.g., `Closes #123`).

## Changes
- [ ] List significant code changes.
- [ ] List any new dependencies or configuration changes.
- [ ] List any updates to documentation.

## Checklist
- [ ] **Build Success**: I have verified that the project builds successfully using **Method A (Binary Repagging)**.
- [ ] **Functionality**: I have manually verified the feature or fix works as expected.
- [ ] **No Regressions**: I have checked that existing features still work correctly.
- [ ] **Documentation**: I have updated relevant documentation for these changes.
- [ ] **Linting**: I have ensured the code follows project's style guidelines.
- [ ] **Security**: I have checked that no hardcoded secrets or unnecessary network requests are included.

## Screenshots (if applicable)
Attach screenshots or screen recordings to demonstrate UI/UX changes.

## Additional Context
Add any other context about the pull request here.
